testcase.name: test_pickle_custom_cache_dir

failure.message: TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'

testcase.failure:
self = <bpemb.tests.bpemb_test.BPEmbTest testMethod=test_pickle_custom_cache_dir>
def test_pickle_custom_cache_dir(self): import pickle from tempfile import mkdtemp from pathlib import Path > bpemb = BPEmb(lang="en", vs=1000, dim=25, cache_dir=mkdtemp()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
bpemb/tests/bpemb_test.py:92: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ bpemb/bpemb.py:174: in __init__ self.model_file = self._load_file(model_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/bpemb.py:234: in _load_file return http_get(file_url, cached_file, ignore_tardir=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/util.py:48: in http_get headers = http_get_temp(url, temp_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
url = 'https://nlp.h-its.org/bpemb/en/en.wiki.bpe.vs1000.model' temp_file = <tempfile._TemporaryFileWrapper object at 0x109671950>
def http_get_temp(url: str, temp_file: IO) -> None: import httpx import warnings from urllib3.exceptions import InsecureRequestWarning
# temporary fix for dealing with this SSL certificate issue: # https://github.com/bheinzerling/bpemb/issues/63 with warnings.catch_warnings(): warnings.simplefilter("ignore", InsecureRequestWarning) > req = httpx.get(url, stream=True, verify=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'
bpemb/util.py:23: TypeError

testcase.name: test_pickle_custom_no_cache

failure.message: TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'

testcase.failure:
self = <bpemb.tests.bpemb_test.BPEmbTest testMethod=test_pickle_custom_no_cache>
def test_pickle_custom_no_cache(self): import pickle from tempfile import mkdtemp from pathlib import Path import shutil cache_dir = mkdtemp() > bpemb = BPEmb(lang="en", vs=1000, dim=25, cache_dir=cache_dir) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
bpemb/tests/bpemb_test.py:110: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ bpemb/bpemb.py:174: in __init__ self.model_file = self._load_file(model_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/bpemb.py:234: in _load_file return http_get(file_url, cached_file, ignore_tardir=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ bpemb/util.py:48: in http_get headers = http_get_temp(url, temp_file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
url = 'https://nlp.h-its.org/bpemb/en/en.wiki.bpe.vs1000.model' temp_file = <tempfile._TemporaryFileWrapper object at 0x10bce8590>
def http_get_temp(url: str, temp_file: IO) -> None: import httpx import warnings from urllib3.exceptions import InsecureRequestWarning
# temporary fix for dealing with this SSL certificate issue: # https://github.com/bheinzerling/bpemb/issues/63 with warnings.catch_warnings(): warnings.simplefilter("ignore", InsecureRequestWarning) > req = httpx.get(url, stream=True, verify=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'
bpemb/util.py:23: TypeError
